title: Detection of in vivo ubiquitinated protein
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4yiga","text":"This protocol was used in our Nature Immunology paper","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":30,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bqgdr","text":"TBS buffer: \r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wccqt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uoek0","text":"50 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0, 150 mM NaCl \r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fttyl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"0lwks","text":"SDS (Sigma) sample buffer (see elsewhere)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"p1nqe","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9wvof","text":"(all the buffers need to be supplemented with deubiquitylation enzyme inhibitors ubiquitin aldehyde and NEM at appropriate concentrations)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ateyk","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1agne","text":"Triton X-100 (Sigma)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ginoj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"loq68","text":"Anti-ubiquitin (clone Ubi-1; Zymed)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tbohc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"oqoec","text":"Protein G beads\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"i0b8j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rldar","text":"LiCl (Sigma)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yift6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"w5vbc","text":"DTT (Sigma)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 50 μl of ice cold TBS to 1×10 6 B cells.
Add 60 μl of TBS containing 2% SDS, mix quickly.
Place immediately on ice for 5 min.
Add 900 μl of TBS containing 1% Triton X-100.
Add anti-ubiquitin (clone Ubi-1, 1-3 μg) and incubate at 4 ˚C overnight on rotator.
Add Protein G beads (50 μl) to the supernatant, incubate at 4 ˚C for 1 h on rotator.
Wash the beads once with 0.5 ml of TBS containing 1% Triton X-100 and 0.1% SDS, and centrifuge (10 000 rpm, 4 ˚C, 1 min).
Wash the beads twice with 0.5 ml of TBS containing 1% Triton X-100 and 0.5 M LiCl, and centrifuge (10 000 rpm, 4 ˚C, 1 min).
Wash the beads once with 0.5 ml of TBS containing 1% Triton X-100 and centrifuge (10 000 rpm, 4 ˚C, 1 min).

Add 50 μl of SDS sample buffer containing 10 mM DTT (Sigma) to the beads, boil at 98 ˚C for 5 min, centrifuge (10 000 rpm, 25 ˚C, 2 min), and apply the supernatant to SDS-polyacrylamide gel. Perform immunoblot.

Kinase MEKK1 is required for CD40-dependent activation of the kinases Jnk and p38, germinal center formation, B cell proliferation and antibody production by Gallagher, E. et al. published in Nature Immunology on 22 Jan, 2007 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/ni1421
creator: Protocols Importer
